# goBlink

> Cross-chain token transfers. One click, any chain, no bridges.

goBlink is a non-custodial cross-chain token transfer platform. Users pick a source token and destination token on any supported chain, sign one transaction, and receive tokens on the other side — typically in under 60 seconds.

## Supported Chains (12)
- Ethereum
- Solana
- Base
- Arbitrum
- Sui
- Polygon
- BNB Chain
- Optimism
- Aptos
- Starknet
- Tron
- NEAR

## Tokens
65+ tokens supported across all chains, including native tokens and major stablecoins (USDC, USDT).

## Key Features
- Non-custodial: goBlink never holds user funds
- Auto-refund: failed transfers are automatically refunded to the sender
- No account required: connect a wallet and go
- Tiered pricing: 0.35% under $5k, 0.10% $5k–$50k, 0.05% over $50k
- Embeddable widget for third-party dApps

## Pages
- / — Landing page
- /app — Swap / transfer interface
- /history — Transaction history (multi-wallet)
- /pay — Create cross-chain payment request links
- /widget — Embeddable widget info
- /embed — Embeddable transfer iframe
- /api-docs — API documentation
- /terms — Terms of Service
- /privacy — Privacy Policy

## API
REST API for programmatic cross-chain transfers. See /api-docs for endpoints, authentication, and usage.

## Contact
- Email: admin@goblink.io
- X: https://x.com/goBlink_io
- Website: https://goblink.io
